title: USA Road Trip Itinerary
values: 🧳 Buy America the Beautiful Annual Pass
Covers ALL National Park vehicle entries. Best value for this trip!
📋 Reserve Maid of the Mist tickets
Adults $24.50, children under 6 FREE. Book timed entry in advance.
🚗 Drive Wrentham, MA to Albany, NY
Drive Route 20 west. Rest stop at Mass Pike services.
Adults $30, under 3 FREE. Farm animals and village common.
⛵ Maid of the Mist boat tour
Ponchos provided. Board at Prospect Point.
FREE admission always! Farm-in-the-Zoo is perfect for toddlers.
Arch tram: adults $15, under 3 FREE. Book tram tickets online.
